name: node-assert
title: node-assert
description:
simple assertion library for javascript
This module is used for writing unit tests for your applications, you can
access it with require('assert').
.
The API is derived from the commonjs 1.0 unit testing spec and the node.js
assert module
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use node-assert because simple assertion library for javascript.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use node-assert as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair node-assert with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `node-assert --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
